dashboard.label: SOC Lab — Threat Overview Dashboard
dashboard.description: Real-time security monitoring across WAF, NIDS, and Web Server layers

search.query: (sourcetype="modsec:audit" OR sourcetype="suricata:eve" event_type="alert") earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count as total_attacks
sourcetype="modsec:audit" modsec_action="Intercepted" earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count as waf_blocks
sourcetype="suricata:eve" event_type="alert" earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count as nids_alerts
(sourcetype="apache:access" OR sourcetype="suricata:eve") earliest=-24h latest=now | stats dc(src_ip) as unique_ips

(sourcetype="modsec:audit" OR sourcetype="suricata:eve" event_type="alert") earliest=-24h latest=now | eval source_layer=case( sourcetype=="modsec:audit", "WAF (ModSecurity)", sourcetype=="suricata:eve", "NIDS (Suricata)" ) | timechart span=5m count by source_layer

(sourcetype="modsec:audit" OR sourcetype="suricata:eve" event_type="alert") earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count as attack_count dc(sourcetype) as layers_triggered values(sourcetype) as sources by src_ip | sort -attack_count | head 10 | rename src_ip as "Source IP", attack_count as "Attacks", layers_triggered as "Layers Hit", sources as "Detection Sources"

sourcetype="modsec:audit" earliest=-24h latest=now | rex field=_raw "\[msg\s+\"(?P<attack_type>[^\"]+)\"\]" | eval attack_category=case( match(attack_type, "(?i)sql"), "SQL Injection", match(attack_type, "(?i)xss|cross.site"), "XSS", match(attack_type, "(?i)rfi|remote.file"), "RFI", match(attack_type, "(?i)lfi|local.file|traversal"), "LFI / Traversal", match(attack_type, "(?i)rce|command|exec"), "Command Injection", match(attack_type, "(?i)scanner|scan"), "Scanner Detection", match(attack_type, "(?i)brute|login"), "Brute Force", 1==1, "Other" ) | stats count by attack_category | sort -count

sourcetype="modsec:audit" earliest=-24h latest=now | rex field=_raw "\[id\s+\"?(?P<rule_id>\d+)\"?\]" | rex field=_raw "\[msg\s+\"(?P<rule_msg>[^\"]+)\"\]" | rex field=_raw "\[severity\s+\"?(?P<severity>\w+)\"?\]" | stats count as hits by rule_id rule_msg severity | sort -hits | head 15 | rename rule_id as "Rule ID", rule_msg as "Description", severity as "Severity", hits as "Hits"

sourcetype="suricata:eve" event_type="alert" earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count as hits by alert.signature alert.severity alert.category | sort -hits | head 15 | rename alert.signature as "Signature", alert.severity as "Severity", alert.category as "Category", hits as "Hits"

panel.title: 🔗 Cross-Layer Correlation — IPs Flagged by BOTH WAF and NIDS

search.query: (sourcetype="modsec:audit" OR sourcetype="suricata:eve" event_type="alert") earliest=-24h latest=now | stats count(eval(sourcetype=="modsec:audit")) as waf_hits count(eval(sourcetype=="suricata:eve")) as nids_hits values(eval(if(sourcetype=="modsec:audit", modsec_msg, null()))) as waf_rules values(eval(if(sourcetype=="suricata:eve", 'alert.signature', null()))) as nids_sigs by src_ip | where waf_hits > 0 AND nids_hits > 0 | sort -(waf_hits + nids_hits) | rename src_ip as "Attacker IP", waf_hits as "WAF Hits", nids_hits as "NIDS Hits", waf_rules as "WAF Rules Matched", nids_sigs as "NIDS Signatures"

panel.title: ✅ WAF Block Rate — Blocked vs Allowed

search.query: sourcetype="modsec:audit" earliest=-24h latest=now | eval action=if(match(_raw, "Action:\s*Intercepted"), "Blocked", "Allowed") | stats count by action

sourcetype="apache:access" earliest=-24h latest=now | eval status_group=case( status >= 200 AND status < 300, "2xx Success", status >= 300 AND status < 400, "3xx Redirect", status >= 400 AND status < 500, "4xx Client Error", status >= 500, "5xx Server Error" ) | stats count by status_group
(sourcetype="modsec:audit" OR sourcetype="suricata:eve" event_type="alert") earliest=-1h latest=now | timechart span=1m count
